mining.diamond: Diamonds spawn below Y=16, but are most abundant at Y=-58. Avoid mining at Y=-64 as it is mostly bedrock. Watch out for Warden in Deep Dark biomes.
mining.ancient_debris: Found in the Nether between Y=8 and Y=22, most common at Y=15. Use beds or TNT to blast mine safely.
mining.iron: Most common at Y=16 in mountains or Y=232, but also found at all levels.
mining.gold: Abundant in Badlands biomes at any level. In other biomes, found below Y=32.

mobs.zombie_villager: To cure: Throw a Splash Potion of Weakness, then feed a Golden Apple. Wait about 3-5 minutes. Useful for getting better trade discounts.
mobs.warden: Extremely dangerous. Spawns in Ancient Cities when Sculk Shriekers are activated 4 times. Best strategy: Avoid or use wool to dampen sounds.
mobs.enderman: Do not look at their eyes. Use a 2-block high ceiling to stay safe and attack feet. Weak to water.
mobs.piglin: Wear at least one piece of gold armor to stay neutral. Love gold ingots for trading (bartering).

survival.nether_portal: Can be built without a diamond pickaxe using lava pools and water buckets to cast obsidian in place.
survival.villager_trading: Librarians provide Enchanted Books (Mending is best). Farmers buy crops for emeralds. Fletchers buy sticks for emeralds.
survival.breath_underwater: Use doors (Java Edition) or magma blocks (crouch to avoid damage) for air pockets. Respiration enchantment helps.
survival.raid: Triggered by entering a village with the Bad Omen effect. Gives Hero of the Village buff upon victory, yielding huge trade discounts.

dimensions.nether: Bring gold armor. Do not sleep in beds (they explode). Use cobble for structures as ghasts cannot break it.
dimensions.end: Bring blocks and ender pearls. Destroy crystals on towers first. Stay away from edges.

technical.trading: Villagers with specific jobs offer valuable items. Fletchers trade sticks for emeralds. Librarians offer Enchanted Books like Mending. Cure zombie villagers to lower prices.
technical.smithing: Use a Smithing Table to upgrade Diamond gear to Netherite using a Netherite Template and a Netherite Ingot. Templates are found in Bastion Remnants.
technical.enchanting: Requires an Enchanting Table and Lapis Lazuli. Surround the table with 15 bookshelves to unlock Level 30 enchantments. Priority: Fortune III, Mending, Sharpness V.
technical.brewing: Start with Awkward Potions (Nether Wart + Water Bottle). Add Blaze Powder as fuel. Use Magma Cream for Fire Resistance, Sugar for Speed, and Glistering Melon for Healing.
